comment.body: It appears there’s a clear negative speed profile above 6725, with traders positioned for an upside bias. Dealers are long the butterfly (long near ATM and short the wings), though higher realized volatility is expected on the upside wing. If we rebound from current levels and can test and hold above 6750, price could stabilize around 6780, with a potential push toward 6800—though that move is unlikely to be sustained, as liquidity near 6785 may act as a magnet. On the downside, a test of 6660 is possible; if that level holds, we would likely reverse back toward the center of the fly. Overall it does look entire zone between 6650-6800 is short gamma signaling illiquidity with more liquidity underneath.
